div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Nicaragua (Hanna)
div.p: 158. Your 244, October 4, noon. The Department has informed the Labor Department that so far as it is concerned it has no objection to the admission of these Nicaraguans. Final decision however rests under the law with the Labor Department.

Please communicate the substance of the foregoing orally to ex-President Diaz as the reply to his recent telegram to Minister Eberhardt who has interested himself in the case as the ex-President requested.
